33 class UniTensorType_class {
34 public:
35 enum : int { Void = -99, Dense = 0, Sparse = 1, Block = 2, BlockFermionic = 3 };
36 std::string getname(const int &ut_type) const;
37 };

56 extern UniTensorType_class UTenType;
57
59 // class DenseUniTensor;
60 class UniTensor_base : public intrusive_ptr_base<UniTensor_base> {
61 public:
62 int uten_type_id; // the unitensor type id.
63 bool _is_braket_form;
64 bool _is_tag;
65 bool _is_diag;
66 cytnx_int64 _rowrank;
67 std::string _name;
68 std::vector<std::string> _labels;
69 std::vector<Bond> _bonds;
70
71 bool _update_braket() {
72 if (_bonds.size() == 0) return false;
73
74 if (this->_bonds[0].type() != bondType::BD_REG) {
75 // check:
76 for (unsigned int i = 0; i < this->_bonds.size(); i++) {
77 if (i < this->_rowrank) {
78 if (this->_bonds[i].type() != bondType::BD_KET) return false;
79 } else {
80 if (this->_bonds[i].type() != bondType::BD_BRA) return false;
81 }
82 }
83 return true;
84 } else {
85 return false;
86 }
87 }
88
89 friend class UniTensor; // allow wrapper to access the private elems
90 friend class DenseUniTensor;
91 friend class BlockUniTensor;
92 friend class BlockFermionicUniTensor;
93
94 UniTensor_base()
95 : _is_tag(false),
96 _name(std::string("")),
97 _is_braket_form(false),
98 _rowrank(0),
99 _is_diag(false),
100 uten_type_id(UTenType.Void){};
101
102 // copy&assignment constr., use intrusive_ptr's !!
103 UniTensor_base(const UniTensor_base &rhs);
104 UniTensor_base &operator=(UniTensor_base &rhs);
105
106 cytnx_uint64 rowrank() const { return this->_rowrank; }
107 bool is_diag() const { return this->_is_diag; }
108 const bool &is_braket_form() const { return this->_is_braket_form; }
109 const bool &is_tag() const { return this->_is_tag; }
110 const std::vector<std::string> &labels() const { return this->_labels; }
117 cytnx_int64 get_index(std::string label) const {
118 std::vector<std::string> labels = this->_labels;
119 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
120 if (labels[i] == label) return i;
121 }
122 return -1;
123 }
124 const std::vector<Bond> &bonds() const { return this->_bonds; }
125 std::vector<Bond> &bonds() { return this->_bonds; }
126
127 Bond &bond_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
128 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_bonds.size(), "[ERROR][bond] index %d out of bound, total %d\n",
129 idx, this->_bonds.size());
130 return this->_bonds[idx];
131 }
132
133 Bond &bond_(const std::string &label) {
134 auto res = std::find(this->_labels.begin(), this->_labels.end(), label);
135 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_labels.end(), "[ERROR] label %s not exists.\n", label.c_str());
136 cytnx_uint64 idx = std::distance(this->_labels.begin(), res);
137
138 return this->bond_(idx);
139 }
140
141 const std::string &name() const { return this->_name; }
142 cytnx_uint64 rank() const { return this->_labels.size(); }
143 void set_name(const std::string &in) { this->_name = in; }
144
156 void set_label(const std::string &oldlabel, const std::string &new_label) {
157 cytnx_int64 idx;
158 auto res = std::find(this->_labels.begin(), this->_labels.end(), oldlabel);
159 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_labels.end(), "[ERROR] label %s not exists.\n",
160 oldlabel.c_str());
161 idx = std::distance(this->_labels.begin(), res);
162
163 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_labels.size(), "[ERROR] index exceed the rank of UniTensor%s",
164 "\n");
165 // check in:
166 bool is_dup = false;
167 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_labels.size(); i++) {
168 if (i == idx) continue;
169 if (new_label == this->_labels[i]) {
170 is_dup = true;
171 break;
172 }
173 }
174 cytnx_error_msg(is_dup, "[ERROR] alreay has a label that is the same as the input label%s",
175 "\n");
176 this->_labels[idx] = new_label;
177 }
178 void set_label(const cytnx_int64 &inx, const std::string &new_label) {
179 cytnx_error_msg(inx < 0, "[ERROR] index is negative%s", "\n");
180 cytnx_error_msg(inx >= this->_labels.size(), "[ERROR] index exceed the rank of UniTensor%s",
181 "\n");
182 // check in:
183 bool is_dup = false;
184 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_labels.size(); i++) {
185 if (i == inx) continue;
186 if (new_label == this->_labels[i]) {
187 is_dup = true;
188 break;
189 }
190 }
191 cytnx_error_msg(is_dup, "[ERROR] alreay has a label that is the same as the input label%s",
192 "\n");
193 this->_labels[inx] = new_label;
194 }
195
196 [[deprecated("Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
197 set_labels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
198 void relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
199 [[deprecated("Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
200 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
201 void relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
202 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
203 [[deprecated(
204 "Please use relabel_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels, const "
205 "std::vector<std::string> &new_labels) instead.")]] void
206 relabels_(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
207 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels); // implemented
208 void relabel_(const std::string &old_label, const std::string &new_label) {
209 this->set_label(old_label, new_label);
210 }
211 void relabel_(const cytnx_int64 &inx, const std::string &new_label) {
212 this->set_label(inx, new_label);
213 }
214
215 int uten_type() { return this->uten_type_id; }
216 std::string uten_type_str() const { return UTenType.getname(this->uten_type_id); }
217

447
448 //======================================================================
450 class DenseUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
451 protected:
452 public:
453 Tensor _block;
454 std::vector<Tensor> _interface_block; // this is serves as interface for get_blocks_();
455 DenseUniTensor *clone_meta() const {
456 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
457 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
458 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
459 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
460 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
461 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
462 tmp->_name = this->_name;
463 tmp->_is_tag = this->_is_tag;
464 return tmp;
465 }
466 //------------------------------------------
467
468 DenseUniTensor() { this->uten_type_id = UTenType.Dense; };
469 friend class UniTensor; // allow wrapper to access the private elems
470 // virtual functions
471
472 // void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &in_labels = {},
473 // const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
474 // const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
475 // const bool &no_alloc = false);
476
477 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
478 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
479 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
480 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
481 // this only work for non-symm tensor
482 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
483 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "");
484 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
485 if (this->_is_diag) {
486 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape = this->_block.shape();
487 shape.push_back(shape[0]);
488 return shape;
489 } else {
490 return this->_block.shape();
491 }
492 }
493 bool is_blockform() const { return false; }
494 void to_(const int &device) { this->_block.to_(device); }
495 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
496 if (this->device() == device) {
497 std::vector<Tensor> _interface_block; // this is serves as interface for get_blocks_();
498 return this;
499 } else {
500 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
501 out->to_(device);
502 return out;
503 }
504 }
505 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
506 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank > this->_labels.size(),
507 "[ERROR] rowrank cannot exceed the rank of UniTensor.%s", "\n");
508 if (this->is_diag()) {
509 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank != 1, "[ERROR] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s",
510 "\n");
511 }
512
513 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
514 }
515
516 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
517 DenseUniTensor *out_raw = this->clone_meta();
518 out_raw->_block = this->_block;
519 out_raw->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
520 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(out_raw);
521 return out;
522 }
523
524 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
525 DenseUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta();
526 tmp->_block = this->_block.clone();
527 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
528 return out;
529 };
530 bool is_contiguous() const { return this->_block.is_contiguous(); }
531 unsigned int dtype() const { return this->_block.dtype(); }
532 int device() const { return this->_block.device(); }
533 std::string dtype_str() const { return Type.getname(this->_block.dtype()); }
534 std::string device_str() const { return Device.getname(this->_block.device()); }
544 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
545 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
546 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
547 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
548
557 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
558 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
559
560 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override {
561 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
562 return;
563 }
564 void twist_(const std::string &label) override {
565 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
566 return;
567 }
568
569 void fermion_twists_() override {
570 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
571 return;
572 }
573
574 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
575 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
576
577 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
578 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
579 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
580 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
581
592 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
593 const std::string &new_label);
594 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
595 const std::string &new_label);
596
597 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
598 DenseUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta();
599 tmp->_block = this->_block.astype(dtype);
600 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
601 return tmp;
602 }
603
604 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const {
605 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] dense unitensor does not have symmetry.%s",
606 "\n");
607 return std::vector<Symmetry>();
608 }
609
610 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
611 this->_block.contiguous_();
612 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
613 }
614 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous() {
615 // if contiguous then return self!
616 if (this->is_contiguous()) {
617 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
618 return out;
619 } else {
620 DenseUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta();
621 tmp->_block = this->_block.contiguous();
622 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
623 return out;
624 }
625 }
626
627 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_() {
628 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
629 }
630 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply() {
631 // just return self
632 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
633 return out;
634 }
635
636 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
637 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
638 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
639 Tensor get_block() const { return this->_block.clone(); }
640 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) const {
641 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
642 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
643 "invalid. Use get_block(0).\n",
644 (unsigned long long)idx);
645 return this->_block.clone();
646 }
647
648 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) const {
649 cytnx_error_msg(
650 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
651 "\n");
652 return Tensor();
653 }
654 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
655 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) const {
656 cytnx_error_msg(
657 true,
658 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block_() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
659 "\n");
660 return this->_block;
661 }
662 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum, const bool &force) {
663 cytnx_error_msg(
664 true,
665 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to get_block_() using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
666 "\n");
667 return this->_block;
668 }
669
670 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
671 Tensor &get_block_() { return this->_block; }
672 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
673 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
674 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
675 "invalid. Use get_block_(0).\n",
676 (unsigned long long)idx);
677 return this->_block;
678 }
679 // return a share view of block, this only work for non-symm tensor.
680 const Tensor &get_block_() const { return this->_block; }
681 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx) const {
682 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
683 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
684 "invalid. Use get_block_(0).\n",
685 (unsigned long long)idx);
686 return this->_block;
687 }
688
689 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const { return 1; };
690 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const {
691 std::vector<Tensor> out;
692 cytnx_error_msg(
693 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks(), use get_block() instead!%s", "\n");
694 return out; // this will not share memory!!
695 }
696 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) const {
697 cytnx_error_msg(
698 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks_(), use get_block_() instead!%s",
699 "\n");
700 return this->_interface_block; // this will not share memory!!
701 }
702 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) {
703 cytnx_error_msg(
704 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Cannot use get_blocks_(), use get_block_() instead!%s",
705 "\n");
706 return this->_interface_block; // this will not share memory!!
707 }
708
709 void put_block(const Tensor &in) {
710 // We don't check the dtype for DenseUniTensor, since it'll be more convenient to change
711 // DenseUniTensor's dtype
712
713 // cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
714 // "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not
715 // match.%s",
716 // "\n");
717 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
718 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
719 "match.%s",
720 "\n");
721 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
722 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
723 if (this->is_diag()) {
724 cytnx_error_msg(
725 in.shape() != this->_block.shape(),
726 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
727 this->_block = in.clone();
728 } else {
729 cytnx_error_msg(
730 in.shape() != this->shape(),
731 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
732 this->_block = in.clone();
733 }
734 }
735 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
736 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
737 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
738 "invalid. Use put_block(0).\n",
739 (unsigned long long)idx);
740 put_block(in);
741 }
742 // share view of the block
743 void put_block_(Tensor &in) {
744 // We don't check the dtype for DenseUniTensor, since it'll be more convenient to change
745 // DenseUniTensor's dtype
746
747 // cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
748 // "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not
749 // match.%s",
750 // "\n");
751 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
752 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
753 "match.%s",
754 "\n");
755 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
756 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
757 if (this->is_diag()) {
758 cytnx_error_msg(
759 in.shape() != this->_block.shape(),
760 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
761 this->_block = in;
762 } else {
763 cytnx_error_msg(
764 in.shape() != this->shape(),
765 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor][put_block] the input tensor shape does not match.%s", "\n");
766 this->_block = in;
767 }
768 }
769 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) {
770 cytnx_error_msg(idx != 0,
771 "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] Dense tensor has only one block, block number %llu "
772 "invalid. Use put_block_(0).\n",
773 (unsigned long long)idx);
774 put_block_(in);
775 }
776
777 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum) {
778 cytnx_error_msg(
779 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to put_block using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
780 "\n");
781 }
782 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qnum) {
783 cytnx_error_msg(
784 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] try to put_block using qnum on a non-symmetry UniTensor%s",
785 "\n");
786 }
787 // these two methods only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
788 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors);
789 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs);
790
791 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0);
792 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
793 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0);
794 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
795 void to_dense_();
796 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
797 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
798 const bool &by_label);
799 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
800 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = true);
801 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
802 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
803 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
804 std::vector<Bond> getTotalQnums(const bool &physical = false) {
805 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] %s",
806 "getTotalQnums can only operate on UniTensor with symmetry.\n");
807 return std::vector<Bond>();
808 }
809
810 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>> get_blocks_qnums() const {
811 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] %s",
812 "get_blocks_qnums can only operate on UniTensor with symmetry.\n");
813 return std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>>();
814 }
815
816 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
817 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.Dense) return false;
818
819 return this->get_block_().same_data(rhs->get_block_());
820 }
821
822 ~DenseUniTensor(){};
823
824 // arithmetic
825 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
826 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs);
827
828 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
829 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
830
831 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
832 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs);
833 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs);
834
835 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
836 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
837 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs);
838
839 void Conj_() { this->_block.Conj_(); };
840
841 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
842 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
843 out->Conj_();
844 return out;
845 }
846
847 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
848 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
849 out->Transpose_();
850 return out;
851 }
852 void Transpose_();
853
854 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
855 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
856 out->normalize_();
857 return out;
858 }
859 void normalize_();
860
861 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
862 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
863 out->Transpose_();
864 return out;
865 }
866 void Dagger_() {
867 this->Conj_();
868 this->Transpose_();
869 }
879 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
880 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
881 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
882 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
883 out->Trace_(a, b);
884 return out;
885 }
886 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
887 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
888 out->Trace_(a, b);
889 return out;
890 }
891
892 Tensor Norm() const;
893
894 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
895 cytnx_error_msg(
896 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
897 "\n");
898 return Scalar::Sproxy();
899 }
900 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
901 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const {
902 cytnx_error_msg(
903 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
904 "\n");
905 return cytnx_complex128(0, 0);
906 }
907 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
908 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const {
909 cytnx_error_msg(
910 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
911 "\n");
912 return cytnx_complex64(0, 0);
913 }
914 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
915 const cytnx_double &aux) const {
916 cytnx_error_msg(
917 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
918 "\n");
919 return 0;
920 }
921 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
922 const cytnx_float &aux) const {
923 cytnx_error_msg(
924 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
925 "\n");
926 return 0;
927 }
928 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
929 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const {
930 cytnx_error_msg(
931 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
932 "\n");
933 return 0;
934 }
935 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
936 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const {
937 cytnx_error_msg(
938 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
939 "\n");
940 return 0;
941 }
942 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
943 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const {
944 cytnx_error_msg(
945 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
946 "\n");
947 return 0;
948 }
949 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
950 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const {
951 cytnx_error_msg(
952 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
953 "\n");
954 return 0;
955 }
956 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
957 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const {
958 cytnx_error_msg(
959 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
960 "\n");
961 return 0;
962 }
963 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
964 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const {
965 cytnx_error_msg(
966 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
967 "\n");
968 return 0;
969 }
970
971 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
972 cytnx_error_msg(
973 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
974 "\n");
975 return Scalar::Sproxy();
976 }
977 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
978 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) {
979 cytnx_error_msg(
980 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
981 "\n");
982 return *(cytnx_complex128 *)nullptr;
983 }

985 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) {
986 cytnx_error_msg(
987 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
988 "\n");
989 return *(cytnx_complex64 *)nullptr;
990 }
