992 cytnx_error_msg(
993 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
994 "\n");
995 return *(cytnx_double *)nullptr;
996 }
997 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux) {
998 cytnx_error_msg(
999 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1000 "\n");
1001 return *(cytnx_float *)nullptr;
1002 }
1003 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux) {
1004 cytnx_error_msg(
1005 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1006 "\n");
1007 return *(cytnx_uint64 *)nullptr;
1008 }
1009 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux) {
1010 cytnx_error_msg(
1011 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1012 "\n");
1013 return *(cytnx_int64 *)nullptr;
1014 }
1015 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux) {
1016 cytnx_error_msg(
1017 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1018 "\n");
1019 return *(cytnx_uint32 *)nullptr;
1020 }
1021 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux) {
1022 cytnx_error_msg(
1023 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1024 "\n");
1025 return *(cytnx_int32 *)nullptr;
1026 }
1027 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux) {
1028 cytnx_error_msg(
1029 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1030 "\n");
1031 return *(cytnx_uint16 *)nullptr;
1032 }
1033 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux) {
1034 cytnx_error_msg(
1035 true, "[ERROR][Internal] This shouldn't be called by DenseUniTensor, something wrong.%s",
1036 "\n");
1037 return *(cytnx_int16 *)nullptr;
1038 }
1039
1040 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
1041 cytnx_error_msg(
1042 true, "[ERROR][DenseUniTensor] elem_exists can only be used on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1043 "\n");
1044 }
1045 void tag() {
1046 if (!this->is_tag()) {
1047 for (int i = 0; i < this->_rowrank; i++) {
1048 this->_bonds[i].set_type(BD_KET);
1049 }
1050 for (int i = this->_rowrank; i < this->_bonds.size(); i++) {
1051 this->_bonds[i].set_type(BD_BRA);
1052 }
1053 this->_is_tag = true;
1054 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
1055 }
1056 }
1066 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &dim);
1067 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &dim);
1068
1069 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, bool force, cytnx_double tol = 0.);
1070
1071 void group_basis_() {
1072 cytnx_warning_msg(true, "[WARNING] group basis will not have any effect on DensUniTensor.%s",
1073 "\n");
1074 }
1075
1076 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
1077 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
1078
1079 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
1080 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_qindices can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1081 "\n");
1082 }
1083 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
1084 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_qindices can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1085 "\n");
1086 }
1087
1088 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const {
1089 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_itoi can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1090 "\n");
1091 }
1092 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() {
1093 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] get_itoi can only be unsed on UniTensor with Symmetry.%s",
1094 "\n");
1095 }
1096
1097 // end virtual function
1098 };
1100
1101 //======================================================================
1103 class BlockUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
1104 protected:
1105 public:
1106 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>>
1107 _inner_to_outer_idx; // stores the qindices for each block
1108 std::vector<Tensor> _blocks;
1109 Tensor NullRefTensor; // this returns when access block does not exists!
1110
1111 // given an index list [loc], get qnums from this->_bonds[loc] and return the combined qnums
1112 // calculated from Symm object! this assume 1. symmetry are the same for each bond!
1113 // 2. total_qns are feeded with size len(symmetry)
1114 void _fx_get_total_fluxs(std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc, const std::vector<Symmetry> &syms,
1115 std::vector<cytnx_int64> &total_qns) {
1116 memset(&total_qns[0], 0, sizeof(cytnx_int64) * total_qns.size());
1117
1118 for (cytnx_int32 i = 0; i < syms.size(); i++) {
1119 if (this->_bonds[0].type() == BD_BRA)
1120 total_qns[i] = syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i]);
1121 else
1122 total_qns[i] = this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i];
1123
1124 for (auto j = 1; j < loc.size(); j++) {
1125 if (this->_bonds[j].type() == BD_BRA)
1126 total_qns[i] = syms[i].combine_rule(
1127 total_qns[i], syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]));
1128 else {
1129 total_qns[i] =
1130 syms[i].combine_rule(total_qns[i], this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]);
1131 }
1132 }
1133 }
1134 }
1135
1136 void _fx_locate_elem(cytnx_int64 &bidx, std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc_in_T,
1137 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1138
1139 // internal function, grouping all duplicate qnums in all bonds
1140 void _fx_group_duplicates(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &dup_bond_idxs,
1141 const std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>> &idx_mappers);
1142
1143 void set_meta(BlockUniTensor *tmp, const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1144 // outer meta
1145 if (outer) {
1146 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
1147 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
1148 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
1149 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
1150 tmp->_name = this->_name;
1151 }
1152
1153 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
1154
1155 // inner meta
1156 if (inner) {
1157 tmp->_inner_to_outer_idx = this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
1158 }
1159 }
1160
1161 BlockUniTensor *clone_meta(const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1162 BlockUniTensor *tmp = new BlockUniTensor();
1163 this->set_meta(tmp, inner, outer);
1164 return tmp;
1165 };
1166
1167 friend class UniTensor;
1168 BlockUniTensor() {
1169 this->uten_type_id = UTenType.Block;
1170 this->_is_tag = true;
1171 }
1172
1173 // virtual functions:
1174 // void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &in_labels = {},
1175 // const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1176 // const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1177 // const bool &no_alloc = false);
1178
1179 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
1180 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1181 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1182 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
1183
1184 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
1185 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "") {
1186 cytnx_error_msg(
1187 true, "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] Cannot use Init_by_tensor() on a BlockUniTensor.%s", "\n");
1188 }
1189
1190 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
1191 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> out(this->_bonds.size());
1192 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) {
1193 out[i] = this->_bonds[i].dim();
1194 }
1195 return out;
1196 }
1197
1198 bool is_blockform() const { return true; }
1199 bool is_contiguous() const {
1200 bool out = true;
1201 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1202 out &= this->_blocks[i].is_contiguous();
1203 }
1204 return out;
1205 };
1206
1207 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const { return this->_blocks.size(); };
1208
1209 void to_(const int &device) {
1210 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1211 this->_blocks[i].to_(device);
1212 }
1213 };
1214
1215 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
1216 if (this->device() == device) {
1217 return this;
1218 } else {
1219 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1220 out->to_(device);
1221 return out;
1222 }
1223 };
1224
1225 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
1226 BlockUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1227 tmp->_blocks = vec_clone(this->_blocks);
1228 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1229 return out;
1230 };
1231
1232 unsigned int dtype() const {
1233 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1234 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1235 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1236 "\n");
1237 #endif
1238 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? Type.Void : this->_blocks[0].dtype();
1239 };
1240 int device() const {
1241 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1242 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1243 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1244 "\n");
1245 #endif
1246 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? -404 : this->_blocks[0].device();
1247 };
1248 std::string dtype_str() const {
1249 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1250 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1251 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1252 "\n");
1253 #endif
1254 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "Void, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].dtype_str();
1255 };
1256 std::string device_str() const {
1257 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1258 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1259 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1260 "\n");
1261 #endif
1262 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "None, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].device_str();
1263 };
1264
1265 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
1266 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1267 "\n");
1268 return this->_blocks[idx].clone();
1269 };
1270
1271 // this one for Block will return the indicies!!
1272 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) const {
1273 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1274 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1275 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1276 "\n");
1277
1278 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1279
1280 // find if the indices specify exists!
1281 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1282 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1283 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1284 b = i;
1285 break;
1286 }
1287 }
1288
1289 if (b < 0) {
1290 if (force_return) {
1291 return NullRefTensor;
1292 } else {
1293 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1294 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1295 "force_return=false, so "
1296 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1297 "error when block is "
1298 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1299 "\n");
1300 }
1301 } else {
1302 return this->_blocks[b].clone();
1303 }
1304 }
1305
1306 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
1307 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1308 "\n");
1309 return this->_blocks[idx];
1310 };
1311
1312 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1313 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1314 "\n");
1315 return this->_blocks[idx];
1316 };
1317
1318 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices,
1319 const bool &force_return) const {
1320 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1321 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1322 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1323 "\n");
1324
1325 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1326
1327 // find if the indices specify exists!
1328 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1329 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1330 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1331 b = i;
1332 break;
1333 }
1334 }
1335
1336 if (b < 0) {
1337 if (force_return) {
1338 return this->NullRefTensor;
1339 } else {
1340 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1341 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1342 "force_return=false, so "
1343 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1344 "error when block is "
1345 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1346 "\n");
1347 }
1348 } else {
1349 return this->_blocks[b];
1350 }
1351 }
1352
1353 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) {
1354 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1355 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1356 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1357 "\n");
1358
1359 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1360
1361 // find if the indices specify exists!
1362 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1363 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1364 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1365 b = i;
1366 break;
1367 }
1368 }
1369
1370 if (b < 0) {
1371 if (force_return) {
1372 return this->NullRefTensor;
1373 } else {
1374 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1375 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
1376 "force_return=false, so "
1377 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
1378 "error when block is "
1379 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
1380 "\n");
1381 }
1382 } else {
1383 return this->_blocks[b];
1384 }
1385 }
1386
1387 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const { return vec_clone(this->_blocks); }
1388 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) const { return this->_blocks; }
1389 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) { return this->_blocks; }
1390
1391 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
1392 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.Block) return false;
1393 if (rhs->get_blocks_(1).size() != this->get_blocks_(1).size()) return false;
1394
1395 for (int i = 0; i < rhs->get_blocks_(1).size(); i++)
1396 if (this->get_blocks_(1)[i].same_data(rhs->get_blocks_(1)[i]) == false) return false;
1397
1398 return true;
1399 }
1400
1401 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
1402 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank > this->rank(),
1403 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] rowrank should be [>=0] and [<=UniTensor.rank].%s",
1404 "\n");
1405 if (this->is_diag()) {
1406 cytnx_error_msg(new_rowrank != 1,
1407 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s",
1408 "\n");
1409 }
1410 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
1411 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
1412 }
1413
1414 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
1415 BlockUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1416 tmp->_blocks = this->_blocks;
1417 tmp->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
1418 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1419 return out;
1420 }
1421
1422 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
1423 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1424 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
1425 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1426
1427 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1428 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
1429
1430 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override {
1431 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1432 return;
1433 }
1434 void fermion_twists_() override {
1435 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1436 return;
1437 }
1438 void twist_(const std::string &label) override {
1439 // do nothing for bosonic UniTensor
1440 return;
1441 }
1442
1443 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
1444 for (unsigned int b = 0; b < this->_blocks.size(); b++) this->_blocks[b].contiguous_();
1445 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
1446 }
1447 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous();
1448
1449 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_() {
1450 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
1451 }
1452 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply() {
1453 // just return self
1454 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(this);
1455 return out;
1456 }
1457
1458 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
1459 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
1460 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
1461
1462 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
1463 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
1464 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
1465
1466 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1467 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1468
1469 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
1470 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1471 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
1472 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
1473
1474 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
1475 const std::string &new_label);
1476 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
1477 const std::string &new_label);
1478
1479 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const;
1480
1481 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
1482 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
1483 }
1484 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
1485 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
1486 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
1487 return nullptr;
1488 }
1489
1490 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
1491 void to_dense_();
1492
1493 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
1494 BlockUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1495 tmp->_blocks.resize(this->_blocks.size());
1496 for (cytnx_int64 blk = 0; blk < this->_blocks.size(); blk++) {
1497 tmp->_blocks[blk] = this->_blocks[blk].astype(dtype);
1498 }
1499 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1500 return out;
1501 };
1502
1503 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
1504 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) {
1505 cytnx_error_msg(
1506 true,
1507 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
1508 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
1509 "\n");
1510 return nullptr;
1511 }
1512
1513 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
1514 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
1515 cytnx_error_msg(
1516 true,
1517 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
1518 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
1519 "\n");
1520 }
1521
1522 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1523 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1524 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1525 "\n");
1526 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1527 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1528 "match.%s",
1529 "\n");
1530 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1531 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1532 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1533 "\n");
1534 cytnx_error_msg(in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
1535 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1536 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1537 idx);
1538
1539 this->_blocks[idx] = in.clone();
1540 }
1541 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
1542 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1543 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1544 "\n");
1545 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1546 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1547 "match.%s",
1548 "\n");
1549 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1550 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1551 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(), "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] index out of range%s",
1552 "\n");
1553 cytnx_error_msg(in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
1554 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1555 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1556 idx);
1557
1558 this->_blocks[idx] = in;
1559 }
1560 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
1561 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1562 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1563 "\n");
1564 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1565 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1566 "match.%s",
1567 "\n");
1568 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1569 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1570 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1571 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1572 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1573 "\n");
1574
1575 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1576
1577 // find if the indices specify exists!
1578 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1579 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1580 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1581 b = i;
1582 break;
1583 }
1584 }
1585
1586 if (b < 0) {
1587 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s",
1588 "\n");
1589 } else {
1590 cytnx_error_msg(
1591 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
1592 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1593 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1594 b);
1595
1596 this->_blocks[b] = in.clone();
1597 }
1598 }
1599 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
1600 cytnx_error_msg(in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
1601 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
1602 "\n");
1603 cytnx_error_msg(in.device() != this->device(),
1604 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
1605 "match.%s",
1606 "\n");
1607 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
1608 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
1609 cytnx_error_msg(indices.size() != this->rank(),
1610 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
1611 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
1612 "\n");
1613
1614 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
1615
1616 // find if the indices specify exists!
1617 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
1618 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
1619 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
1620 b = i;
1621 break;
1622 }
1623 }
1624
1625 if (b < 0) {
1626 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s",
1627 "\n");
1628 } else {
1629 cytnx_error_msg(
1630 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
1631 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
1632 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
1633 b);
1634 this->_blocks[b] = in;
1635 }
1636 }
1637
1638 void tag() {
1639 // no-use!
1640 }
1641
1642 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
1643 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1644 out->Conj_();
1645 return out;
1646 }
1647
1648 void Conj_() {
1649 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1650 this->_blocks[i].Conj_();
1651 }
1652 };
1653
1654 void Transpose_();
1655 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
1656 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1657 out->Transpose_();
1658 return out;
1659 }
1660
1661 void normalize_();
1662 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
1663 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1664 out->normalize_();
1665 return out;
1666 }
1667
1668 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
1669 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
1670 out->Transpose_();
1671 return out;
1672 }
1673 void Dagger_() {
1674 this->Conj_();
1675 this->Transpose_();
1676 }
1677
1678 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
1679 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
1680
1681 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
1682 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1683 out->Trace_(a, b);
1684 if (out->rank() == 0) {
1685 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
1686 tmp->_block = ((BlockUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
1687 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
1688 }
1689 return out;
1690 }
1691 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
1692 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1693 out->Trace_(a, b);
1694 if (out->rank() == 0) {
1695 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
1696 tmp->_block = ((BlockUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
1697 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
1698 }
1699 return out;
1700 }
1701
1702 Tensor Norm() const;
1703
1704 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1705
1706 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1707 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1708 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const;
1709 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1710 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const;
1711 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1712 const cytnx_double &aux) const;
1713 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1714 const cytnx_float &aux) const;
1715 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1716 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const;
1717 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1718 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const;
1719 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1720 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const;
1721 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1722 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const;
1723 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1724 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const;
1725 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1726 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const;
1727
1728 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator);
1729 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1730 const cytnx_complex128 &aux);
1731 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
1732 const cytnx_complex64 &aux);
1733 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux);
1734 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux);
1735 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux);
1736 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux);
1737 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux);
1738 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux);
1739 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux);
1740 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux);
1741
1742 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
1743 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
1744
1745 // this will remove the [q_index]-th qnum at [bond_idx]-th Bond!
1746 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
1747 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
1748
1749 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1750 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs) {
1751 cytnx_error_msg(
1752 true,
1753 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '+' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1754 "\n",
1755 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1756 "to do operation on blocks.");
1757 }
1758
1759 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1760 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
1761
1762 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1763 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
1764 cytnx_error_msg(
1765 true,
1766 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1767 "\n",
1768 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1769 "to do operation on blocks.");
1770 }
1771 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs) {
1772 cytnx_error_msg(
1773 true,
1774 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1775 "\n",
1776 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) "
1777 "to do operation on blocks.");
1778 }
1779
1780 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
1781 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
1782 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs) {
1783 cytnx_error_msg(
1784 true,
1785 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '/' between Scalar and BlockUniTensor.\n %s "
1786 "\n",
1787 "This operation would cause division by zero on non-block elements. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
1788 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
1789 }
1790 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, bool force, cytnx_double tol = 0.);
1791
1792 void group_basis_();
1793
1794 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1795 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1796 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
1797 const bool &by_label);
1798 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
1799
1800 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
1801 cytnx_error_msg(
1802 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
1803 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
1804 this->Nblocks());
1805 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
1806 }
1807 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
1808 cytnx_error_msg(
1809 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
1810 "[ERROR][BlockUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
1811 this->Nblocks());
1812 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
1813 }
1814
1815 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const { return this->_inner_to_outer_idx; }
1816 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() { return this->_inner_to_outer_idx; }
1817 };
1819
1820 //======================================================================
1822 class BlockFermionicUniTensor : public UniTensor_base {
1823 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; additionally sign flips are stored as
1824 //_signflip and taken care of in all the methods
1825 public:
1826 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>>
1827 _inner_to_outer_idx; // stores the qindices for each block
1828 std::vector<Tensor> _blocks;
1829 Tensor NullRefTensor; // this returns when accessed block does not exists!
1830 // additional informaiton for fermions:
1831 std::vector<cytnx_bool>
1832 _signflip; // if true, the sign of the corresponding block needs to be flipped
1833
1834 // given an index list [loc], get qnums from this->_bonds[loc] and return the combined qnums
1835 // calculated from Symm object! this assume 1. symmetry are the same for each bond!
1836 // 2. total_qns are feeded with size len(symmetry)
1837 void _fx_get_total_fluxs(std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc, const std::vector<Symmetry> &syms,
1838 std::vector<cytnx_int64> &total_qns) {
1839 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1840 memset(&total_qns[0], 0, sizeof(cytnx_int64) * total_qns.size());
1841
1842 for (cytnx_int32 i = 0; i < syms.size(); i++) {
1843 if (this->_bonds[0].type() == BD_BRA)
1844 total_qns[i] = syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i]);
1845 else
1846 total_qns[i] = this->_bonds[0]._impl->_qnums[loc[0]][i];
1847
1848 for (auto j = 1; j < loc.size(); j++) {
1849 if (this->_bonds[j].type() == BD_BRA)
1850 total_qns[i] = syms[i].combine_rule(
1851 total_qns[i], syms[i].reverse_rule(this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]));
1852 else {
1853 total_qns[i] =
1854 syms[i].combine_rule(total_qns[i], this->_bonds[j]._impl->_qnums[loc[j]][i]);
1855 }
1856 }
1857 }
1858 }
1859
1860 void _fx_locate_elem(cytnx_int64 &bidx, std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &loc_in_T,
1861 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
1862
1863 // internal function, grouping all duplicate qnums in all bonds
1864 void _fx_group_duplicates(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &dup_bond_idxs,
1865 const std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_uint64>> &idx_mappers);
1866
1867 void set_meta(BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp, const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1868 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; additionally, _signflip is set
1869 // outer meta
1870 if (outer) {
1871 tmp->_bonds = vec_clone(this->_bonds);
1872 tmp->_labels = this->_labels;
1873 tmp->_is_braket_form = this->_is_braket_form;
1874 tmp->_rowrank = this->_rowrank;
1875 tmp->_name = this->_name;
1876 // tmp->_signflip = vec_clone(this->_signflip);
1877 tmp->_signflip = this->_signflip;
1878 }
1879
1880 tmp->_is_diag = this->_is_diag;
1881
1882 // inner meta
1883 if (inner) {
1884 tmp->_inner_to_outer_idx = this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
1885 }
1886 }
1887
1888 BlockFermionicUniTensor *clone_meta(const bool &inner, const bool &outer) const {
1889 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1890 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = new BlockFermionicUniTensor();
1891 this->set_meta(tmp, inner, outer);
1892 return tmp;
1893 };
1894
1895 friend class UniTensor;
1896 BlockFermionicUniTensor() {
1897 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1898 this->uten_type_id = UTenType.BlockFermionic;
1899 this->_is_tag = true;
1900 }
1901
1902 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
1903 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
1904 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
1905 const bool &no_alloc = false, const std::string &name = "");
1906
1907 void Init_by_Tensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
1908 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const std::string &name = "") {
1909 cytnx_error_msg(true,
1910 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] Cannot use Init_by_tensor() on a "
1911 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.%s",
1912 "\n");
1913 }
1914
1915 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> shape() const {
1916 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1917 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> out(this->_bonds.size());
1918 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < out.size(); i++) {
1919 out[i] = this->_bonds[i].dim();
1920 }
1921 return out;
1922 }
1923
1924 bool is_blockform() const {
1925 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1926 return true;
1927 }
1928
1929 bool is_contiguous() const {
1930 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1931 bool out = true;
1932 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1933 out &= this->_blocks[i].is_contiguous();
1934 }
1935 return out;
1936 };
1937
1938 cytnx_uint64 Nblocks() const {
1939 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1940 return this->_blocks.size();
1941 };
1942
1943 std::vector<bool> signflip() const override { return this->_signflip; };
1944 std::vector<bool> &signflip_() override { return this->_signflip; };
1945
1946 void to_(const int &device) {
1947 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1948 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
1949 this->_blocks[i].to_(device);
1950 }
1951 };
1952
1953 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to(const int &device) {
1954 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1955 if (this->device() == device) {
1956 return this;
1957 } else {
1958 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
1959 out->to_(device);
1960 return out;
1961 }
1962 };
1963
1964 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> clone() const {
1965 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; changed to BlockFermionicUniTensor as
1966 // output
1967 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
1968 tmp->_blocks = vec_clone(this->_blocks);
1969 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
1970 return out;
1971 };
1972
1973 unsigned int dtype() const {
1974 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1975 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1976 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1977 "\n");
1978 #endif
1979 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? Type.Void : this->_blocks[0].dtype();
1980 };
1981 int device() const {
1982 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1983 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1984 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1985 "\n");
1986 #endif
1987 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? -404 : this->_blocks[0].device();
1988 };
1989 std::string dtype_str() const {
1990 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1991 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
1992 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
1993 "\n");
1994 #endif
1995 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "Void, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].dtype_str();
1996 };
1997 std::string device_str() const {
1998 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
1999 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2000 cytnx_error_msg(this->_blocks.size() == 0, "[ERROR][internal] empty blocks for blockform.%s",
2001 "\n");
2002 #endif
2003 return this->_blocks.size() < 1 ? "None, no valid blocks" : this->_blocks[0].device_str();
2004 };
2005
2006 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
2007 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2008 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2009 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2010 return this->_blocks[idx].clone();
2011 };
2012
2013 // this one for Block will return the indicies!!
2014 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) const {
2015 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2016 cytnx_error_msg(
2017 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2018 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2019 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2020 "\n");
2021
2022 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2023
2024 // find if the indices specify exists!
2025 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2026 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2027 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2028 b = i;
2029 break;
2030 }
2031 }
2032
2033 if (b < 0) {
2034 if (force_return) {
2035 return NullRefTensor;
2036 } else {
2037 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2038 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2039 "force_return=false, so "
2040 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2041 "error when block is "
2042 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2043 "\n");
2044 }
2045 } else {
2046 return this->_blocks[b].clone();
2047 }
2048 }
2049
2050 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
2051 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2052 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2053 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2054 return this->_blocks[idx];
2055 };
2056
2057 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2058 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2059 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2060 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2061 return this->_blocks[idx];
2062 };
2063
2064 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices,
2065 const bool &force_return) const {
2066 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2067 cytnx_error_msg(
2068 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2069 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2070 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2071 "\n");
2072
2073 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2074
2075 // find if the indices specify exists!
2076 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2077 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2078 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2079 b = i;
2080 break;
2081 }
2082 }
2083
2084 if (b < 0) {
2085 if (force_return) {
2086 return this->NullRefTensor;
2087 } else {
2088 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2089 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2090 "force_return=false, so "
2091 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2092 "error when block is "
2093 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2094 "\n");
2095 }
2096 } else {
2097 return this->_blocks[b];
2098 }
2099 }
2100
2101 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices, const bool &force_return) {
2102 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2103 cytnx_error_msg(
2104 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2105 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2106 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2107 "\n");
2108
2109 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2110
2111 // find if the indices specify exists!
2112 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2113 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2114 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2115 b = i;
2116 break;
2117 }
2118 }
2119
2120 if (b < 0) {
2121 if (force_return) {
2122 return this->NullRefTensor;
2123 } else {
2124 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2125 "[ERROR][get_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists, "
2126 "force_return=false, so "
2127 "error throws. \n If you want to return an empty block without "
2128 "error when block is "
2129 "not avaliable, set force_return=True.%s",
2130 "\n");
2131 }
2132 } else {
2133 return this->_blocks[b];
2134 }
2135 }
2136
2137 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const {
2138 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2139 return vec_clone(this->_blocks);
2140 }
2141 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) const {
2142 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2143 return this->_blocks;
2144 }
2145 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &) {
2146 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2147 return this->_blocks;
2148 }
2149
2150 bool same_data(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs) const {
2151 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; changed to BlockFermionic UTenType
2152 if (rhs->uten_type() != UTenType.BlockFermionic) return false;
2153 if (rhs->get_blocks_(1).size() != this->get_blocks_(1).size()) return false;
2154
2155 for (int i = 0; i < rhs->get_blocks_(1).size(); i++)
2156 if (this->get_blocks_(1)[i].same_data(rhs->get_blocks_(1)[i]) == false) return false;
2157
2158 return true;
2159 }
2160
2161 void set_rowrank_(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) {
2162 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2163 cytnx_error_msg(
2164 new_rowrank > this->rank(),
2165 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] rowrank should be [>=0] and [<=UniTensor.rank].%s", "\n");
2166 if (this->is_diag()) {
2167 cytnx_error_msg(
2168 new_rowrank != 1,
2169 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] rowrank should be [==1] when is_diag =true!.%s", "\n");
2170 }
2171 this->_rowrank = new_rowrank;
2172 this->_is_braket_form = this->_update_braket();
2173 }
2174
2175 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> set_rowrank(const cytnx_uint64 &new_rowrank) const {
2176 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; output type changed to
2177 // BlockFermionicUniTensor
2178 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
2179 tmp->_blocks = this->_blocks;
2180 tmp->set_rowrank_(new_rowrank);
2181 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
2182 return out;
2183 }
2184
2185 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2186 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
2187 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
2188 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1);
2189
2190 void permute_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2191 void permute_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2192
2193 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute_nosignflip(
2194 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2195 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> permute_nosignflip(
2196 const std::vector<std::string> &mapper, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2197 void permute_nosignflip_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2198 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2199 void permute_nosignflip_(const std::vector<std::string> &mapper,
2200 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1) override;
2201
2202 void twist_(const cytnx_int64 &idx) override;
2203 void twist_(const std::string &label) override;
2204 void fermion_twists_() override;
2205
2206 // Helper function; implements the sign flips when permuting indices
2207 std::vector<bool> _swapsigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper) const;
2208 std::vector<bool> _lhssigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &mapper,
2209 const cytnx_int64 contrno) const;
2210 std::vector<bool> _swapsigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &mapper) const;
2211 std::vector<bool> _lhssigns_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &mapper,
2212 const cytnx_uint64 contrno) const;
2213
2214 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous_() {
2215 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2216 for (unsigned int b = 0; b < this->_blocks.size(); b++) this->_blocks[b].contiguous_();
2217 return boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(this);
2218 }
2219 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contiguous();
2220
2221 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply_();
2222 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> apply();
2223
2224 void print_diagram(const bool &bond_info = false) const;
2225 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const;
2226 void print_block(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const bool &full_info = true) const;
2227
2228 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> contract(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs,
2229 const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
2230 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false);
2231
2232 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2233 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2234
2235 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
2236 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2237 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabels(const std::vector<std::string> &old_labels,
2238 const std::vector<std::string> &new_labels);
2239
2240 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const std::string &old_label,
2241 const std::string &new_label);
2242 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> relabel(const cytnx_int64 &inx,
2243 const std::string &new_label);
2244 std::vector<Symmetry> syms() const;
2245
2246 void reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
2247 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
2248 }
2249 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
2250 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
2251 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] Cannot reshape a UniTensor with symmetry.%s", "\n");
2252 return nullptr;
2253 }
2254
2255 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> to_dense();
2256 void to_dense_();
2257
2258 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
2259 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2260 BlockFermionicUniTensor *tmp = this->clone_meta(true, true);
2261 tmp->_blocks.resize(this->_blocks.size());
2262 for (cytnx_int64 blk = 0; blk < this->_blocks.size(); blk++) {
2263 tmp->_blocks[blk] = this->_blocks[blk].astype(dtype);
2264 }
2265 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(tmp);
2266 return out;
2267 };
2268
2269 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
2270 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) {
2271 cytnx_error_msg(
2272 true,
2273 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
2274 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
2275 "\n");
2276 return nullptr;
2277 }
2278
2279 // this will only work on non-symm tensor (DenseUniTensor)
2280 void set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
2281 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2282 cytnx_error_msg(
2283 true,
2284 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][get] Cannot use get on a UniTensor with "
2285 "Symmetry.\n suggestion: try get_block/get_block_/get_blocks/get_blocks_ first.%s",
2286 "\n");
2287 }
2288
2289 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2290 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2291 cytnx_error_msg(
2292 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2293 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2294 "\n");
2295 cytnx_error_msg(
2296 in.device() != this->device(),
2297 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2298 "match.%s",
2299 "\n");
2300 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2301 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2302 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2303 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2304 cytnx_error_msg(
2305 in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
2306 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2307 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2308 idx);
2309
2310 this->_blocks[idx] = in.clone();
2311 }
2312 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
2313 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2314 cytnx_error_msg(
2315 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2316 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2317 "\n");
2318 cytnx_error_msg(
2319 in.device() != this->device(),
2320 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2321 "match.%s",
2322 "\n");
2323 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2324 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2325 cytnx_error_msg(idx >= this->_blocks.size(),
2326 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] index out of range%s", "\n");
2327 cytnx_error_msg(
2328 in.shape() != this->_blocks[idx].shape(),
2329 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2330 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2331 idx);
2332
2333 this->_blocks[idx] = in;
2334 }
2335 void put_block(const Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
2336 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2337 cytnx_error_msg(
2338 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2339 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2340 "\n");
2341 cytnx_error_msg(
2342 in.device() != this->device(),
2343 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2344 "match.%s",
2345 "\n");
2346 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2347 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2348 cytnx_error_msg(
2349 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2350 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2351 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2352 "\n");
2353
2354 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2355
2356 // find if the indices specify exists!
2357 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2358 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2359 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2360 b = i;
2361 break;
2362 }
2363 }
2364
2365 if (b < 0) {
2366 cytnx_error_msg(
2367 true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s", "\n");
2368 } else {
2369 cytnx_error_msg(
2370 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
2371 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2372 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2373 b);
2374
2375 this->_blocks[b] = in.clone();
2376 }
2377 }
2378 void put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indices) {
2379 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2380 cytnx_error_msg(
2381 in.dtype() != this->dtype(),
2382 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor dtype does not match.%s",
2383 "\n");
2384 cytnx_error_msg(
2385 in.device() != this->device(),
2386 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor][put_block] The input tensor device does not "
2387 "match.%s",
2388 "\n");
2389 // We shouldn't check the contiguous
2390 // cytnx_error_msg(!in.contiguous());
2391 cytnx_error_msg(
2392 indices.size() != this->rank(),
2393 "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] len(indices) must be the same as the "
2394 "Tensor rank (number of legs).%s",
2395 "\n");
2396
2397 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inds(indices.begin(), indices.end());
2398
2399 // find if the indices specify exists!
2400 cytnx_int64 b = -1;
2401 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < this->_inner_to_outer_idx.size(); i++) {
2402 if (inds == this->_inner_to_outer_idx[i]) {
2403 b = i;
2404 break;
2405 }
2406 }
2407
2408 if (b < 0) {
2409 cytnx_error_msg(
2410 true, "[ERROR][put_block][BlockFermionicUniTensor] no avaliable block exists.%s", "\n");
2411 } else {
2412 cytnx_error_msg(
2413 in.shape() != this->_blocks[b].shape(),
2414 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] the shape of input tensor does not match the shape "
2415 "of block @ idx=%d\n",
2416 b);
2417 this->_blocks[b] = in;
2418 }
2419 }
2420
2421 void tag() {
2422 // no-use!
2423 }
2424
2425 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Conj() {
2426 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2427 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2428 out->Conj_();
2429 return out;
2430 }
2431
2432 void Conj_() {
2433 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2434 for (int i = 0; i < this->_blocks.size(); i++) {
2435 this->_blocks[i].Conj_();
2436 }
2437 };
2438
2439 // Transpose(_) changes the index order without sign flips and reverses the bond directions for
2440 // fermionic tensors
2441 void Transpose_();
2442 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Transpose() {
2443 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2444 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2445 out->Transpose_();
2446 return out;
2447 }
2448
2449 void normalize_();
2450 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> normalize() {
2451 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2452 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2453 out->normalize_();
2454 return out;
2455 }
2456
2457 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Dagger() {
2458 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2459 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->Conj();
2460 out->Transpose_();
2461 return out;
2462 }
2463 void Dagger_() {
2464 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2465 this->Conj_();
2466 this->Transpose_();
2467 }
2468
2469 void Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b);
2470 void Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b);
2471
2472 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
2473 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2474 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2475 out->Trace_(a, b);
2476 if (out->rank() == 0) {
2477 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
2478 tmp->_block = ((BlockFermionicUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
2479 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
2480 }
2481 return out;
2482 }
2483 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a, const cytnx_int64 &b) {
2484 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor; the tensor type was adapted
2485 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out = this->clone();
2486 out->Trace_(a, b);
2487 if (out->rank() == 0) {
2488 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
2489 tmp->_block = ((BlockFermionicUniTensor *)out.get())->_blocks[0];
2490 out = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
2491 }
2492 return out;
2493 }
2494
2495 Tensor Norm() const;
2496
2497 bool elem_exists(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
2498
2499 const Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const;
2500 const cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2501 const cytnx_complex128 &aux) const;
2502 const cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2503 const cytnx_complex64 &aux) const;
2504 const cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2505 const cytnx_double &aux) const;
2506 const cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2507 const cytnx_float &aux) const;
2508 const cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2509 const cytnx_uint64 &aux) const;
2510 const cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2511 const cytnx_int64 &aux) const;
2512 const cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2513 const cytnx_uint32 &aux) const;
2514 const cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2515 const cytnx_int32 &aux) const;
2516 const cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2517 const cytnx_uint16 &aux) const;
2518 const cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2519 const cytnx_int16 &aux) const;
2520
2521 Scalar::Sproxy at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator);
2522 cytnx_complex128 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2523 const cytnx_complex128 &aux);
2524 cytnx_complex64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator,
2525 const cytnx_complex64 &aux);
2526 cytnx_double &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_double &aux);
2527 cytnx_float &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_float &aux);
2528 cytnx_uint64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint64 &aux);
2529 cytnx_int64 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int64 &aux);
2530 cytnx_uint32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint32 &aux);
2531 cytnx_int32 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int32 &aux);
2532 cytnx_uint16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_uint16 &aux);
2533 cytnx_int16 &at_for_sparse(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator, const cytnx_int16 &aux);
2534
2535 void _save_dispatch(std::fstream &f) const;
2536 void _load_dispatch(std::fstream &f);
2537
2538 // this will remove the [q_index]-th qnum at [bond_idx]-th Bond!
2539 void truncate_(const std::string &label, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
2540 void truncate_(const cytnx_int64 &bond_idx, const cytnx_uint64 &q_index);
2541
2542 void Add_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2543 void Add_(const Scalar &rhs) {
2544 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2545 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '+' between Scalar and "
2546 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2547 "\n",
2548 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2549 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2550 }
2551
2552 void Mul_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2553 void Mul_(const Scalar &rhs);
2554
2555 void Sub_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2556 void Sub_(const Scalar &rhs) {
2557 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2558 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and "
2559 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2560 "\n",
2561 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2562 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2563 }
2564 void lSub_(const Scalar &lhs) {
2565 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2566 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '-' between Scalar and "
2567 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2568 "\n",
2569 "This operation would destroy the block structure. [Suggest] Avoid or use "
2570 "get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2571 }
2572
2573 void Div_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs);
2574 void Div_(const Scalar &rhs);
2575 void lDiv_(const Scalar &lhs) {
2576 cytnx_error_msg(true,
2577 "[ERROR] Cannot perform elementwise arithmetic '/' between Scalar and "
2578 "BlockFermionicUniTensor.\n %s "
2579 "\n",
2580 "This operation would cause division by zero on non-block elements. "
2581 "[Suggest] Avoid or use get/put_block(s) to do operation on blocks.");
2582 }
2583 void from_(const boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> &rhs, bool force, cytnx_double tol = 0.);
2584
2585 void group_basis_();
2586
2587 void combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2588 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2589 void combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,
2590 const bool &by_label);
2591 void combineBonds(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false);
2592
2593 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) const {
2594 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2595 cytnx_error_msg(
2596 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
2597 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
2598 this->Nblocks());
2599 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
2600 }
2601 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &get_qindices(const cytnx_uint64 &bidx) {
2602 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2603 cytnx_error_msg(
2604 bidx >= this->Nblocks(),
2605 "[ERROR][BlockFermionicUniTensor] bidx out of bound! only %d blocks in current UTen.\n",
2606 this->Nblocks());
2607 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx[bidx];
2608 }
2609
2610 const vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() const {
2611 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2612 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
2613 }
2614 vec2d<cytnx_uint64> &get_itoi() {
2615 //[21 Aug 2024] This is a copy from BlockUniTensor;
2616 return this->_inner_to_outer_idx;
2617 }
2618
2619 void beauty_print_block(std::ostream &os, const cytnx_uint64 &Nin, const cytnx_uint64 &Nout,
2620 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qn_indices,
2621 const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const Tensor &block) const;
2622 };
2624
2625 //======================================================================
2626
2628 class UniTensor_options {
2629 public:
2630 bool _is_diag;
2631 int _dtype;
2632 int _device;
2633 int _rowrank;
2634
2635 UniTensor_options() {
2636 this->_is_diag = false;
2637 this->_dtype = Type.Double;
2638 this->_device = Device.cpu;
2639 this->_rowrank = -1;
2640 }
2641
2642 UniTensor_options(const UniTensor_options &rhs) {
2643 this->_is_diag = rhs._is_diag;
2644 this->_dtype = rhs._dtype;
2645 this->_device = rhs._device;
2646 this->_rowrank = rhs._rowrank;
2647 }
2648
2649 UniTensor_options &operator=(const UniTensor_options &rhs) {
2650 this->_is_diag = rhs._is_diag;
2651 this->_dtype = rhs._dtype;
2652 this->_device = rhs._device;
2653 this->_rowrank = rhs._rowrank;
2654 return *this;
2655 }
2656
2657 UniTensor_options &is_diag(const bool &in) {
2658 this->_is_diag = in;
2659 return *this;
2660 }
2661 UniTensor_options &dtype(const int &in) {
2662 this->_dtype = in;
2663 return *this;
2664 }
2665 UniTensor_options &device(const int &in) {
2666 this->_device = in;
2667 return *this;
2668 }
2669 UniTensor_options &rowrank(const int &in) {
2670 this->_rowrank = in;
2671 return *this;
2672 }
2673 };
2675
2677 class UniTensor {
2678 public:
2680 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> _impl;
2681 UniTensor() : _impl(new UniTensor_base()){};
2682 UniTensor(const UniTensor &rhs) { this->_impl = rhs._impl; }
2683 UniTensor &operator=(const UniTensor &rhs) {
2684 this->_impl = rhs._impl;
2685 return *this;
2686 }
2688
2690
2716 explicit UniTensor(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false,
2717 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1,
2718 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {}, const std::string &name = "")
2719 : _impl(new UniTensor_base()) {
2720 this->Init(in_tensor, is_diag, rowrank, in_labels, name);
2721 }
2739 void Init(const Tensor &in_tensor, const bool &is_diag = false, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1,
2740 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {}, const std::string &name = "") {
2741 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new DenseUniTensor());
2742 out->Init_by_Tensor(in_tensor, is_diag, rowrank, name);
2743 this->_impl = out;
2744 if (in_labels.size() != 0) this->set_labels(in_labels);
2745 }
2747
2749
2766 UniTensor(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2767 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
2768 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
2769 const std::string &name = "")
2770 : _impl(new UniTensor_base()) {
2771 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2772 cytnx_warning_msg(
2773 true,
2774 "[DEBUG] message: entry for UniTensor(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const "
2775 "std::vector<std::string> &in_labels={}, const cytnx_int64 &rowrank=-1, const unsigned "
2776 "int "
2777 "&dtype=Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag=false)%s",
2778 "\n");
2779 #endif
2780 this->Init(bonds, in_labels, rowrank, dtype, device, is_diag, name);
2781 }
2782
2784 /* [developing]
2785 void Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2786 const UniTensor_options &UToptions = UniTensor_options(), const std::string &name =
2787 ""){ this->Init(bonds,in_labels, UToptions._rowrank, UToptions._dtype , UToptions._device ,
2788 UToptions._is_diag,
2789 name);
2790 }
2791 */
2793
2813 UniTensor &Init(const std::vector<Bond> &bonds, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
2814 const cytnx_int64 &rowrank = -1, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
2815 const int &device = Device.cpu, const bool &is_diag = false,
2816 const std::string &name = "") {
2817 // checking type:
2818 bool is_sym = false;
2819 int sym_fver = -1;
2820 bool fermionic = false;
2821
2822 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < bonds.size(); i++) {
2823 // check
2824 if (bonds[i].syms().size() != 0) {
2825 is_sym = true;
2826 if (sym_fver == -1)
2827 sym_fver = bonds[i]._impl->_degs.size();
2828 else {
2829 cytnx_error_msg((bool(sym_fver) ^ bool(bonds[i]._impl->_degs.size())),
2830 "[ERROR] When initializing a UniTensor with symmetries, all Bonds must "
2831 "be in the same format!%s",
2832 "\n");
2833 }
2834 if (!fermionic) {
2835 std::vector<Symmetry> symms = bonds[i].syms();
2836 for (cytnx_uint64 i = 0; i < symms.size(); i++) {
2837 if (symms[i].is_fermionic()) fermionic = true;
2838 }
2839 }
2840 } else
2841 cytnx_error_msg(
2842 is_sym, "[ERROR] Cannot have bonds with mixing of symmetry and non-symmetry.%s", "\n");
2843 }
2844
2845 // dynamical dispatch:
2846 if (is_sym) {
2847 #ifdef UNI_DEBUG
2848 cytnx_warning_msg(true, "[DEBUG] message: entry dispatch: UniTensor: symmetric%s", "\n");
2849 #endif
2850 cytnx_error_msg(
2851 sym_fver < 1,
2852 "[ERROR] Symmetric tensor, but no degeneracies given. The UniTensor seems broken.%s",
2853 "\n");
2854 if (fermionic) {
2855 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new BlockFermionicUniTensor());
2856 this->_impl = out;
2857 } else {
2858 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new BlockUniTensor());
2859 this->_impl = out;
2860 }
2861 } else {
2862 boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base> out(new DenseUniTensor());
2863 this->_impl = out;
2864 }
2865 this->_impl->Init(bonds, in_labels, rowrank, dtype, device, is_diag, false, name);
2866 return *this;
2867 }
2868
2875 UniTensor &set_name(const std::string &in) {
2876 this->_impl->set_name(in);
2877 return *this;
2878 }
2879
2890 UniTensor &set_label(const cytnx_int64 &idx, const std::string &new_label) {
2891 this->_impl->set_label(idx, new_label);
2892 return *this;

2969 "Please use "

2971 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
2972 set_labels(const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) {

2976 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
2977
2978 this->_impl->set_labels(vs);
2979 return *this;
2980 }

2999 template <class T>
3000 T &item() {
3001 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_blockform(),
3002 "[ERROR] Cannot use item on UniTensor with Symmetry.\n suggestion: use "
3003 "get_block()/get_blocks() first.%s",
3004 "\n");
3005
3006 DenseUniTensor *tmp = static_cast<DenseUniTensor *>(this->_impl.get());
3007 return tmp->_block.item<T>();
3008 }
3009
3010 Scalar::Sproxy item() const {
3011 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_blockform(),
3012 "[ERROR] Cannot use item on UniTensor with Symmetry.\n suggestion: use "
3013 "get_block()/get_blocks() first.%s",
3014 "\n");
3015
3016 DenseUniTensor *tmp = static_cast<DenseUniTensor *>(this->_impl.get());
3017 return tmp->_block.item();
3018 }

3283 UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3284 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3285 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3286 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3287 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3288
3289 UniTensor out;
3290 out._impl = this->_impl->relabel(vs);
3291 return out;
3292 }

3299 "Please use "

3301 "instead.")]] UniTensor

3305 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3306 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3307
3308 UniTensor out;
3309 out._impl = this->_impl->relabels(vs);
3310 return out;
3311 }

3316 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3317 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3318 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3319 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3320
3321 this->_impl->relabel_(vs);

3408
3413 UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3414 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3415 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3416 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3417 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3418 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3419
3420 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3421 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3422 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3423 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3424
3425 return this->relabel(vs_old, vs);
3426 }
3427
3433 [[deprecated(
3434 "Please use "
3435 "UniTensor relabel(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels, const "
3436 "std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const "
3437 "instead.")]] UniTensor
3438 relabels(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3439 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) const {
3440 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3441 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3442 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3443 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3444
3445 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3446 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3447 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3448 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3449
3450 return this->relabels(vs_old, vs);
3451 }
3452
3457 UniTensor &relabel_(const std::initializer_list<char *> &old_labels,
3458 const std::initializer_list<char *> &new_labels) {
3459 std::vector<char *> new_lbls(new_labels);
3460 std::vector<std::string> vs(new_lbls.size());
3461 transform(new_lbls.begin(), new_lbls.end(), vs.begin(),
3462 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3463
3464 std::vector<char *> old_lbls(old_labels);
3465 std::vector<std::string> vs_old(old_lbls.size());
3466 transform(old_lbls.begin(), old_lbls.end(), vs_old.begin(),
3467 [](char *x) -> std::string { return std::string(x); });
3468
3469 this->relabel_(vs_old, vs);
3470 return *this;
3471 }

3478 "Please use "

3481 "instead.")]] UniTensor &

3488

3493

3569 UniTensor astype(const unsigned int &dtype) const {
3570 UniTensor out;
3571 if (this->dtype() == dtype) {
3572 out._impl = this->_impl;
3573 } else {
3574 out._impl = this->_impl->astype(dtype);
3575 }
3576 return out;
3577 }

3616 transform(mprs.begin(), mprs.end(), vs.begin(),

3618

3864 void print_blocks(const bool &full_info = true) const { this->_impl->print_blocks(full_info); }
3865

3872 this->_impl->print_block(idx, full_info);

3882 this->_impl->group_basis_();
