3891
3900 template <class T>
3901 T &at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
3902 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3903 // [NEW] this will not check if it exists, if it is not then error will throw!
3904 T aux;
3905 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3906 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
3907 return this->get_block_().at<T>(locator);
3908 } else {
3909 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
3910 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
3911 cytnx_error_msg(
3912 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
3913 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
3914 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
3915 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
3916 }
3917 }
3918
3927 template <class T>
3928 const T &at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3929 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3930 // [NEW] this will not check if it exists, if it is not then error will throw!
3931 T aux;
3932 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator, aux);
3933 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
3934 return this->get_block_().at<T>(locator);
3935 } else {
3936 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
3937 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
3938 cytnx_error_msg(
3939 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
3940 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
3941 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
3942 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
3943 }
3944 }
3945
3946 template <class T>
3947 const T &at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
3948 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3949 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
3950 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
3951 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
3952 "\n");
3953 cytnx_error_msg(
3954 labels.size() != this->rank(),
3955 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
3956 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
3957 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
3958 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
3959 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
3960 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
3961 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
3962 labels[i].c_str());
3963 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
3964 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
3965 }
3966 return this->at<T>(new_locator);
3967 }
3968 template <class T>
3969 T &at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
3970 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
3971 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
3972 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
3973 "\n");
3974 cytnx_error_msg(
3975 labels.size() != this->rank(),
3976 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
3977 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
3978 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
3979 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
3980 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
3981 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
3982 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
3983 labels[i].c_str());
3984 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
3985 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
3986 }
3987 return this->at<T>(new_locator);
3988 }
3989
3997 const Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
3998 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
3999 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4000 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
4001 return this->get_block_().at(locator);
4002 } else {
4003 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
4004 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
4005 cytnx_error_msg(
4006 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
4007 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
4008 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
4009 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
4010 }
4011 }
4012
4020 Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4021 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
4022 return this->_impl->at_for_sparse(locator);
4023 } else if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Dense) {
4024 return this->get_block_().at(locator);
4025 } else {
4026 cytnx_error_msg(this->uten_type() == UTenType.Void,
4027 "[ERROR] UniTensor is not initialized and of type Void.%s", "\n");
4028 cytnx_error_msg(
4029 this->uten_type() == UTenType.Sparse,
4030 "[ERROR] SparseUniTensor is deprecated. Use BlockUniTensor or LinOp instead.%s", "\n");
4031 cytnx_error_msg(true, "[ERROR] UniTensor type '%s' not supported\n",
4032 this->uten_type_str().c_str());
4033 }
4034 }
4035
4036 Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
4037 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) {
4038 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4039 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4040 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4041 "\n");
4042 cytnx_error_msg(
4043 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4044 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4045 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4046 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4047 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4048 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4049 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4050 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4051 labels[i].c_str());
4052 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4053 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4054 }
4055 return this->at(new_locator);
4056 }
4057
4058 const Scalar::Sproxy at(const std::vector<std::string> &labels,
4059 const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &locator) const {
4060 // giving label <-> locator one to one corresponding, return the element:
4061 cytnx_error_msg(locator.size() != labels.size(),
4062 "[ERROR][at] length of list should be the same for label and locator.%s",
4063 "\n");
4064 cytnx_error_msg(
4065 labels.size() != this->rank(),
4066 "[ERROR][at] length of lists must be the same as UniTensor.rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4067 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_locator(this->rank());
4068 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4069 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4070 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4071 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4072 "[ERROR] label:%s does not exist in current UniTensor.\n",
4073 labels[i].c_str());
4074 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4075 new_locator[new_loc] = locator[i];
4076 }
4077 return this->at(new_locator);
4078 }
4079
4080 // return a copy of the block with the given block index
4089 Tensor get_block(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const { return this->_impl->get_block(idx); };
4090 //================================
4091 // return a clone of block
4103 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) const {
4104 return this->_impl->get_block(qidx, force);
4105 }
4106
4107 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4108 const bool &force = false) const {
4109 cytnx_error_msg(
4110 labels.size() != qidx.size(),
4111 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4112 cytnx_error_msg(labels.size() != this->rank(),
4113 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4114
4115 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4116 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4117
4118 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4119 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4120 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4121 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4122 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4123 "[ERROR][get_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4124 labels[i].c_str());
4125 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4126 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4127 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4128 }
4129 auto out = this->_impl->get_block(new_qidx, force);
4130 if (out.dtype() != Type.Void) out.permute_(new_order);
4131 return out;
4132 }
4133
4138 Tensor get_block(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qnum,
4139 const bool &force = false) const {
4140 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qnum;
4141 return get_block(tmp, force);
4142 }
4143
4148 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qnum, const bool &force = false) const {
4149 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqnum(qnum.begin(), qnum.end());
4150 return this->_impl->get_block(iqnum, force);
4151 }
4152
4153 Tensor get_block(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4154 const bool &force = false) const {
4155 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqnum(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4156 return this->get_block(labels, iqnum, force);
4157 }
4158
4167 const Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) const {
4168 return this->_impl->get_block_(idx);
4169 }
4170
4175 Tensor &get_block_(const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) { return this->_impl->get_block_(idx); }
4176
4188 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4189 return this->_impl->get_block_(qidx, force);
4190 }
4191
4208 // developer note: Tensor is not the same object (Thus Tensor instead of Tensor& ),
4209 // since we permute! but they have shared data memory.
4210 Tensor get_block_(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4211 const bool &force = false) {
4212 cytnx_error_msg(
4213 labels.size() != qidx.size(),
4214 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4215 cytnx_error_msg(labels.size() != this->rank(),
4216 "[ERROR][get_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4217
4218 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4219 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4220
4221 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4222 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4223 for (int i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
4224 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), labels[i]);
4225 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4226 "[ERROR][get_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4227 labels[i].c_str());
4228 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4229 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4230 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4231 }
4232 auto out = this->_impl->get_block_(new_qidx, force);
4233 if (out.dtype() != Type.Void) {
4234 out = out.permute(new_order);
4235 }
4236 return out;
4237 }
4238
4242 Tensor &get_block_(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4243 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qidx;
4244 return get_block_(tmp, force);
4245 }
4246
4250 Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx, const bool &force = false) {
4251 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4252 return get_block_(iqidx, force);
4253 }
4254
4255 Tensor get_block_(const std::vector<std::string> &labels, const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4256 const bool &force = false) {
4257 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4258 return get_block_(labels, iqidx, force);
4259 }
4260 //================================
4261
4262 // this only work for non-symm tensor. return a shared view of block
4266 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4267 const bool &force = false) const {
4268 return this->_impl->get_block_(qidx, force);
4269 }
4270
4274 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &qidx,
4275 const bool &force = false) const {
4276 std::vector<cytnx_int64> tmp = qidx;
4277 return this->_impl->get_block_(tmp, force);
4278 }
4279
4283 const Tensor &get_block_(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &qidx,
4284 const bool &force = false) const {
4285 std::vector<cytnx_int64> iqidx(qidx.begin(), qidx.end());
4286 return get_block_(iqidx, force);
4287 }
4288
4289 //================================
4301 //[dev]
4302 std::vector<Tensor> get_blocks() const { return this->_impl->get_blocks(); }
4303

4313 const std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) const {
4314 return this->_impl->get_blocks_(silent);
4315 }
4316
4320 //[dev]
4321 std::vector<Tensor> &get_blocks_(const bool &silent = false) {
4322 return this->_impl->get_blocks_(silent);
4323 }
4324
4334 UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
4335 this->_impl->put_block(in, idx);
4336 return *this;
4337 }
4338
4344 [[deprecated(
4345 "Please use "
4346 "UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx) "
4347 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4348 put_block(const Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx, const bool &force) {
4349 this->_impl->put_block(in, idx);
4350 return *this;
4351 }
4352
4362 UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4363 this->_impl->put_block(in_tens, qidx);
4364 return *this;
4365 }
4366
4372 [[deprecated(
4373 "Please use "
4374 "UniTensor &put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4375 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4376 put_block(const Tensor &in_tens, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4377 this->_impl->put_block(in_tens, qidx);
4378 return *this;
4379 }
4380
4389 UniTensor &put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4390 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4391 cytnx_error_msg(
4392 lbls.size() != qidx.size(),
4393 "[ERROR][put_block] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s", "\n");
4394 cytnx_error_msg(lbls.size() != this->rank(),
4395 "[ERROR][put_block] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4396
4397 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4398 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4399
4400 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4401 // std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4402 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inv_order(this->rank());
4403 for (int i = 0; i < lbls.size(); i++) {
4404 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), lbls[i]);
4405 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4406 "[ERROR][put_block] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4407 lbls[i].c_str());
4408 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4409 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4410 // new_order[i] = new_loc;
4411 inv_order[new_loc] = i;
4412 }
4413 this->_impl->put_block(in.permute(inv_order), new_qidx);
4414 return *this;
4415 }
4416
4422 [[deprecated(
4423 "Please use "
4424 "UniTensor &put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls, const "
4425 "std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4426 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4427 put_block(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4428 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4429 return put_block(in, lbls, qidx);
4430 }
4431
4441 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const cytnx_uint64 &idx = 0) {
4442 this->_impl->put_block_(in, idx);
4443 return *this;
4444 }
4445
4455 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4456 this->_impl->put_block_(in, qidx);
4457 return *this;
4458 }
4459
4465 [[deprecated(
4466 "Please use "
4467 "UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4468 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4469 put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4470 this->_impl->put_block_(in, qidx);
4471 return *this;
4472 }
4473
4482 UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4483 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) {
4484 cytnx_error_msg(
4485 lbls.size() != qidx.size(),
4486 "[ERROR][put_block_] length of lists must be the same for both lables and qnidices%s",
4487 "\n");
4488 cytnx_error_msg(lbls.size() != this->rank(),
4489 "[ERROR][put_block_] length of lists must be the rank (# of legs)%s", "\n");
4490
4491 std::vector<cytnx_int64> loc_id(this->rank());
4492 std::vector<cytnx_int64> new_qidx(this->rank());
4493
4494 cytnx_uint64 new_loc;
4495 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> new_order(this->rank());
4496 std::vector<cytnx_uint64> inv_order(this->rank());
4497 for (int i = 0; i < lbls.size(); i++) {
4498 auto res = std::find(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), this->_impl->_labels.end(), lbls[i]);
4499 cytnx_error_msg(res == this->_impl->_labels.end(),
4500 "[ERROR][put_block_] label:%s does not exists in current Tensor.\n",
4501 lbls[i].c_str());
4502 new_loc = std::distance(this->_impl->_labels.begin(), res);
4503 new_qidx[new_loc] = qidx[i];
4504 new_order[i] = new_loc;
4505 inv_order[new_loc] = i;
4506 }
4507 in.permute_(inv_order);
4508 this->_impl->put_block_(in, new_qidx);
4509 in.permute_(new_order);
4510 return *this;
4511 }
4512
4518 [[deprecated(
4519 "Please use "
4520 "UniTensor &put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls, const "
4521 "std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx) "
4522 "instead.")]] UniTensor &
4523 put_block_(Tensor &in, const std::vector<std::string> &lbls,
4524 const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &qidx, const bool &force) {
4525 return put_block_(in, lbls, qidx);
4526 }
4527
4543 UniTensor get(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors) const {
4544 UniTensor out;
4545 out._impl = this->_impl->get(accessors);
4546 return out;
4547 }
4548
4553 UniTensor operator[](const std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> &accessors) const {
4554 UniTensor out;
4555 out._impl = this->_impl->get(accessors);
4556 return out;
4557 }
4558 UniTensor operator[](const std::initializer_list<cytnx::Accessor> &accessors) const {
4559 std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> acc_in = accessors;
4560 return this->get(acc_in);
4561 }
4562 UniTensor operator[](const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &accessors) const {
4563 std::vector<cytnx::Accessor> acc_in;
4564 for (cytnx_int64 i = 0; i < accessors.size(); i++) {
4565 acc_in.push_back(cytnx::Accessor(accessors[i]));
4566 }
4567 return this->get(acc_in);
4568 }
4569 UniTensor operator[](const std::initializer_list<cytnx_int64> &accessors) const {
4570 std::vector<cytnx_int64> acc_in = accessors;
4571 return (*this)[acc_in];
4572 }
4573
4590 UniTensor &set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const Tensor &rhs) {
4591 this->_impl->set(accessors, rhs);
4592 return *this;
4593 }
4594 UniTensor &set(const std::vector<Accessor> &accessors, const UniTensor &rhs) {
4595 cytnx_error_msg(
4596 rhs.uten_type() != UTenType.Dense,
4597 "[ERROR] Cannot set elements from UniTensor with symmetry. Use at() instead.%s", "\n");
4598 cytnx_error_msg(this->is_diag(), "[ERROR] Cannot set UniTensor with is_diag=True.%s", "\n");
4599 cytnx_error_msg(rhs.is_diag(),
4600 "[ERROR] Cannot set UniTensor. incoming UniTensor is_diag=True.%s", "\n");
4601
4602 this->_impl->set(accessors, rhs.get_block());
4603 return *this;
4604 }
4605
4613 UniTensor reshape(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape, const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
4614 UniTensor out;
4615 out._impl = this->_impl->reshape(new_shape, rowrank);
4616 return out;
4617 }
4618
4625 UniTensor &reshape_(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &new_shape,
4626 const cytnx_uint64 &rowrank = 0) {
4627 this->_impl->reshape_(new_shape, rowrank);
4628 return *this;
4629 }

4641 UniTensor to_dense() {
4642 UniTensor out;
4643 out._impl = this->_impl->to_dense();
4644 return out;
4645 }
4646
4651 UniTensor &to_dense_() {
4652 this->_impl->to_dense_();
4653 return *this;
4654 }

4665 combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force,

4692 combineBonds(const std::vector<cytnx_int64> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {

4694 }
4695
4706 UniTensor &combineBond(const std::vector<std::string> &indicators, const bool &force = false) {

4729 UniTensor contract(const UniTensor &inR, const bool &mv_elem_self = false,
4730 const bool &mv_elem_rhs = false) const {
4731 UniTensor out;
4732 out._impl = this->_impl->contract(inR._impl, mv_elem_self, mv_elem_rhs);
4733 return out;
4734 }

4745 std::vector<Bond> getTotalQnums(const bool physical = false) const {
4746 return this->_impl->getTotalQnums(physical);

4752 std::vector<std::vector<cytnx_int64>> get_blocks_qnums() const {
4753 return this->_impl->get_blocks_qnums();
4754 }
4756
4761 bool same_data(const UniTensor &rhs) const {
4762 // check same type:
4763 if (this->_impl->uten_type() != rhs._impl->uten_type()) return false;
4764
4765 return this->_impl->same_data(rhs._impl);
4766 }
4767
4784 UniTensor &Add_(const UniTensor &rhs) {
4785 this->_impl->Add_(rhs._impl);
4786 return *this;
4787 }
4788
4805 UniTensor &Mul_(const UniTensor &rhs) {
4806 this->_impl->Mul_(rhs._impl);
4807 return *this;
4808 }
4809
4826 UniTensor &Sub_(const UniTensor &rhs) {
4827 this->_impl->Sub_(rhs._impl);
4828 return *this;
4829 }

5322 UniTensor Trace(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) const {
5323 UniTensor out;
5324 out._impl = this->_impl->Trace(a, b);
5325 return out;
5326 }
5327
5337 UniTensor Trace(const cytnx_int64 &a = 0, const cytnx_int64 &b = 1) const {
5338 UniTensor out;
5339 out._impl = this->_impl->Trace(a, b);
5340 return out;
5341 }
5342
5352 UniTensor &Trace_(const std::string &a, const std::string &b) {
5353 this->_impl->Trace_(a, b);
5354 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
5355 // handle if no leg left case for BlockUniTensor.
5356 if (this->rank() == 0) {
5357 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
5358 tmp->_block = this->get_blocks_(true)[0];
5359 this->_impl = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
5360 }
5361 }
5362 return *this;
5363 }
5364
5374 UniTensor &Trace_(const cytnx_int64 &a = 0, const cytnx_int64 &b = 1) {
5375 this->_impl->Trace_(a, b);
5376 if (this->uten_type() == UTenType.Block || this->uten_type() == UTenType.BlockFermionic) {
5377 // handle if no leg left case for BlockUniTensor.
5378 if (this->rank() == 0) {
5379 DenseUniTensor *tmp = new DenseUniTensor();
5380 tmp->_block = this->get_blocks_(true)[0];
5381 this->_impl = boost::intrusive_ptr<UniTensor_base>(tmp);
5382 }
5383 }
5384 return *this;
5385 }
5386
5395 UniTensor Dagger() const {
5396 UniTensor out;
5397 out._impl = this->_impl->Dagger();
5398 return out;
5399 }

5409 UniTensor &Dagger_() {

5411 return *this;
5412 }

5423 this->_impl->tag();
5424 return *this;
5425 }

5568 return out;

5583 return out;

5639
5640 // Generators:
5653 static UniTensor zeros(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem,
5654 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5655 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5656 const std::string &name = "") {
5657 return UniTensor(cytnx::zeros(Nelem, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5658 }
5659
5673 static UniTensor zeros(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape,
5674 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5675 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5676 const std::string &name = "") {
5677 return UniTensor(cytnx::zeros(shape, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5678 }
5679
5691 static UniTensor ones(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5692 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5693 const std::string &name = "") {
5694 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(Nelem, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5695 }
5696
5710 static UniTensor identity(const cytnx_uint64 &dim,
5711 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5712 const cytnx_bool &is_diag = false,
5713 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5714 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5715 if (is_diag) {
5716 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(dim, dtype, device), is_diag, -1, in_labels, name);
5717 } else {
5718 return UniTensor(cytnx::identity(dim, dtype, device), is_diag, -1, in_labels, name);
5719 }
5720 }
5721
5737 static UniTensor eye(const cytnx_uint64 &dim, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5738 const cytnx_bool &is_diag = false, const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5739 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5740 return identity(dim, in_labels, is_diag, dtype, device, name);
5741 }
5742
5755 static UniTensor ones(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape,
5756 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5757 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5758 const std::string &name = "") {
5759 return UniTensor(cytnx::ones(shape, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5760 }
5761
5776 static UniTensor arange(const cytnx_int64 &Nelem,
5777 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5778 const std::string &name = "") {
5779 return UniTensor(cytnx::arange(Nelem), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5780 }
5781
5799 static UniTensor arange(const cytnx_double &start, const cytnx_double &end,
5800 const cytnx_double &step = 1,
5801 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5802 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5803 const std::string &name = "") {
5804 return UniTensor(cytnx::arange(start, end, step, dtype, device), false, -1, in_labels, name);
5805 }
5806
5826 static UniTensor linspace(const cytnx_double &start, const cytnx_double &end,
5827 const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const bool &endpoint = true,
5828 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5829 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5830 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "") {
5831 return UniTensor(cytnx::linspace(start, end, Nelem, endpoint, dtype, device), false, -1,
5832 in_labels, name);
5833 }
5834
5835 // Random Generators:
5854 static UniTensor normal(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const double &mean, const double &std,
5855 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5856 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5857 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5858 const std::string &name = "");
5859
5878 static UniTensor normal(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape, const double &mean,
5879 const double &std, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5880 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5881 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double, const int &device = Device.cpu,
5882 const std::string &name = "");
5883
5902 static UniTensor uniform(const cytnx_uint64 &Nelem, const double &low, const double &high,
5903 const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5904 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5905 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5906 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "");
5907
5945 static UniTensor uniform(const std::vector<cytnx_uint64> &shape, const double &low,
5946 const double &high, const std::vector<std::string> &in_labels = {},
5947 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device(),
5948 const unsigned int &dtype = Type.Double,
5949 const int &device = Device.cpu, const std::string &name = "");
5950
5951 // Inplace Random Generators:
5964 UniTensor &normal_(const double &mean, const double &std,
5965 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device());
5966
5979 UniTensor &uniform_(const double &low = 0, const double &high = 1,
5980 const unsigned int &seed = cytnx::random::__static_random_device());
5981
5982 }; // class UniTensor
5983
5985 std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const UniTensor &in);
5987
6000 UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &inL, const UniTensor &inR, const bool &cacheL = false,
6001 const bool &cacheR = false);
6002
6015 UniTensor Contract(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order,
6016 const bool &optimal);
6017
6023 [[deprecated(
6024 "Please use "
6025 "UniTensor Contract(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order, const bool "
6026 "&optimal) "
6027 "instead.")]] UniTensor
6028 Contracts(const std::vector<UniTensor> &TNs, const std::string &order, const bool &optimal);
6029
6031 void _resolve_CT(std::vector<UniTensor> &TNlist);
6032 template <class... T>
6033 void _resolve_CT(std::vector<UniTensor> &TNlist, const UniTensor &in, const T &...args) {
6034 TNlist.push_back(in);
6035 _resolve_CT(TNlist, args...);
6036 }
6038
6050 template <class... T>
6051 UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order,
6052 const bool &optimal) {
6053 std::vector<UniTensor> TNlist;
6054 _resolve_CT(TNlist, in, args...);
6055 return Contract(TNlist, order, optimal);
6056 }
6057
6063 template <class... T>
6064 [[deprecated(
6065 "Please use "
6066 "UniTensor Contract(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order, const "
6067 "bool &optimal) "
6068 "instead.")]] UniTensor
6069 Contracts(const UniTensor &in, const T &...args, const std::string &order,
6070 const bool &optimal) {
6071 std::vector<UniTensor> TNlist;
6072 _resolve_CT(TNlist, in, args...);
6073 return Contracts(TNlist, order, optimal);
6074 }
6075
6076} // namespace cytnx
